meaning: adj.中等的,适度的,适中的v.缓和
examples: He was an easygoing man of very moderate views.
The team enjoyed only moderate success last season.
Lasik is best for moderate, not severe, vision problems.
Mild to moderate mental illness also nearly doubled, from 9.7 percent to 19.9 percent.
The Fed says it sees signs of slower growth that may moderate inflation pressures.
